title: Product Marketing Specialist (M/W/D)
missing_skills: German language fluency (hard requirement — very good German language skills)
Digital marketing campaign execution (explicit tool experience)
core_responsibilities: Develop and implement marketing strategies for technical spring products
Conduct market and competitive analyses to identify trends and potential
Create product information, sales materials and presentations
Plan and execute campaigns, trade fairs and digital marketing initiatives
Collaborate closely with Sales and R&D teams
recommended_emphasis: Highlight competitive analysis and market segmentation — maps to market and competitive analysis responsibility
Emphasize sales enablement and collateral development as evidence of sales materials and presentations capability
Showcase trade fair and meeting presentation experience to match Messen responsibility
Stress cross-functional influence across Sales and R&D to align with enge Zusammenarbeit requirement
If any German language proficiency exists, state it explicitly — it is a hard gate
Quantify EMEA/Asia multi-market experience to demonstrate international B2B marketing scope relevant to a global Mittelstand
